channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Busy wildfire season challenges US fire bosses as they manage resources to stay ahead
Supreme Court urges Congress for more security: 'Threats have come very close'
item.description: Justices Elena Kagan and Amy Coney Barrett asked Congress for additional funding to improve protection for the justices, citing close calls.

item.title: Florida prisoner, 74, set to become oldest inmate executed in state's modern history
House GOP leaders break logjam after conservative revolt
item.description: The House ended a deadlock on Tuesday that had stalled most legislative activity on the floor.
